controller.prompt: Tick the 'Manually adjust the segmentation plane' checkbox to adjust the plane, or leave unchecked to jump to step 16.
Tick the 'Manually adjust the boundary planes' checkbox to adjust the planes, or leave unchecked to jump to step 20.
Tick the 'Manually adjust the paths' checkbox to adjust the paths, or leave unchecked to stop here.

cb_step_1.title: Select the source volume for segmentation.
cb_step_1.instruction: Select the volume from the Source Volume section.

cb_step_3.title: Add a segment and rename to 'Cranial_Segment'.

cb_step_5.title: Set threshold range.
cb_step_5.instruction: Adjust the range bar to the desired values.

cb_step_7.title: Choose skull segmentation node.
cb_step_7.instruction: Select the skull segment from the list.

cb_step_10.title: Set crop radius (mm).
cb_step_10.instruction: Adjust the range bar for crop radius.

cb_step_13.title: Manually adjust the segmentation plane?
cb_step_13.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust, No to skip.

cb_step_14.title: Adjust separation plane.
cb_step_14.instruction: Adjust the plane in the 3D view, then click Done.

cb_step_17.title: Manually adjust the boundary planes?
cb_step_17.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust, No to skip.

cb_step_18.title: Adjust boundary planes.
cb_step_18.instruction: Adjust the planes in the 3D view, then click Done.

cb_step_21.title: Manually adjust the paths?
cb_step_21.instruction: Choose Yes to adjust, No to skip.

cb_step_22.title: Adjust implant paths.
cb_step_22.instruction: Adjust the paths in the 3D view, then click Done.

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation node named 'Cranial_Segmentation'
Add a segment and rename it to 'Cranial_Segment'
Activate the Threshold effect in Segment Editor
Create a new segmentation node named 'Cranial_Segmentation'
Add a segment and rename it to 'Cranial_Segment'
Activate the Threshold effect in Segment Editor
Compute the symmetry plane from skull segmentation and entry points
Cut the skull using a cylinder crop
Separate maxilla and mandible using a default separation plane
Apply the manually adjusted separation plane to recompute maxilla/mandible
Identify zygomatic bones and create boundary planes
Apply the manually adjusted boundary planes to recompute zygoma
Generate implant paths and create line nodes, implant models, and table
Apply the manually adjusted paths to update implant data and table

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
